variant: Hitachi CP / MP series (Binary protocol with header BE EF 03 06)
notes: Source: Hitachi CP-AW250N / CP-WX5505 / MP-WU8101 RS232 service manuals.
Wire: D-Sub 9-pin cross-over. 19200 8N1, no flow control. Default baud is 19200 (configurable 4800-115200 in the projector menu).
Packet format: BE EF 03 06 00 <CRC_lo> <CRC_hi> <action_lo> <action_hi> <type_lo> <type_hi> <code_lo> <code_hi>  — 13 bytes total.
CRC bytes are NOT a simple checksum — they are model-specific values pre-computed by Hitachi and listed in the manual's command table for each individual command.

Only power_on / power_off are included here because they share the same CRC across all CP/MP series. Other commands (input switching, mute, freeze, navigation) need the model-specific CRC from each projector's manual command table — request the 'RS-232C Communication Command Table' for the exact model in use.

GET commands (action 02 00) and their CRC values are universally documented across CP/MP series and are safe to send. Responses are 5 bytes: 1D <data_lo> <data_hi> <crc_lo> <crc_hi>. POWER GET returns 00 00=Off, 01 00=On, 02 00=Cool down. LAMP TIME / FILTER TIME GET return runtime in hours as a 16-bit little-endian value.
